notes: Vendor-reported eval numbers from the GPT-5.5 launch post. Harnesses and asterisks are theirs. Cross-vendor comparison is not independent.

scores.caveat: OpenAI notes labs have claimed memorization evidence on this eval.

claims.statement: OpenAI claims GPT-5.5 improves coding scores vs GPT-5.4 while using fewer tokens, and cites Artificial Analysis Coding Index for SOTA intelligence at half the cost of competitive frontier coding models.
claims.implication: Token efficiency can dominate sticker $/MTok; measure cost-per-successful-task.

claims.statement: In Codex, Fast mode generates tokens 1.5× faster for 2.5× the cost.
claims.implication: Speed is an explicit cost multiplier, separate from model id.
